title: 8 Ways a Godly Man Governs Himself When No One's Grading Him
caption:
A city with no walls falls. A man who can't govern himself is the same thing.

The real test of self-control isn't the moment someone's watching. It's the plate you stop at, the phone you put down before it decides for you, the workout you do when you could just as easily skip it.

8 ways a godly man governs himself when no one's grading him:

1. He puts the phone away before it decides for him.
2. He finishes the boring task instead of the interesting one.
3. He goes to bed on time even though nothing's stopping him from staying up.
4. He tells the truth about the small thing.
5. He stops at one plate, one drink, one episode.
6. He prays before he checks his phone in the morning.
7. He does the workout he doesn't feel like doing.
8. He confesses the thing he could easily hide.

Which one would change your week if you actually ran it? Save this and pick one for tomorrow.

#faith #christianmen #selfcontrol #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
